Attorney for Plaintiffs Scott Okamoto appeared in court.
Defendant John Hong not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiffs presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiffd TERRI YIN, JADDE HONG, DANIEL HONG, EDWARD HONG, AND DOROTHY HONG and they confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiffs and their Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiffs Jadde Hong, Daniel Hong, Edward Hong, Terri Yin, and Dorothy Hong against Defendant John Hong, regarding partition of real property and appointment of referee Amy Herrington

Judgment signed by the court this day.

After review of the documents filed and statements of consel, the court requires an appearance by one party from the other two groups involved in this trust.

The court will require one of the members of the Hong Family Trust to appear and the court will require either Daniel Hong or Dorothy Hong as trustees of the Hong Family Trust to appear as well to testify in this matter.

This matter is continued to February 11, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505.

Counsel may contact this department either by phone call or email if he wishes to change this date to another which is more convenient to all.
